title: Blue Room Forever
lyricSeed:
Never leave the bedroom, screen is all I know
Monitor glow hums a static lullaby so low
Nobody's knocking, nobody comes home
Just me and the buffering, buffering alone
Y2K decay is peeling off the wall
I don't wanna load the outside world at all
